zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol於1264年出生在德國巴登可萊斯 奧分波格度爾巴賀霍恩格時，她的父親Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch29歲，母親Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg24歲。她和Heinrich III. von Baden-Hachberg至少有2個兒子。她去世於1310年在德國艾爾薩斯-洛斯林根貝可 洛斯林根格吉享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol于1264年出生在德国巴登可萊斯 奧分波格度爾巴賀霍恩格时，她的父亲Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch29岁，母亲Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg24岁。她和Heinrich III. von Baden-Hachberg至少有2个儿子。她去世于1310年在德国艾爾薩斯-洛斯林根貝可 洛斯林根格吉享年46岁。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol was born in 1264, in Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Germany, her father, Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch, was 29 and her mother, Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg, was 24. She had at least 2 sons with Heinrich III. von Baden-Hachberg. She died in 1310, in Gorz, Lothringen, Alsace-Lorraine, Germany, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol est née en 1264, à Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Allemagne, son père, Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Heinrich III. von Baden-Hachberg. Elle est décédée en 1310, à Gorz, Lorraine, Alsace-Lorraine, Allemagne, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol 1264 in Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch 29 und ihre Mutter Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg 24. Sie hatte mit Heinrich III. von Baden-Hachberg mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1310 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Gorz, Bezirk Lothringen, Elsaß-Lothringen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol è nata il nel 1264 nel Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Germania, sua padre, Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Heinrich III. von Baden-Hachberg. Morì nel 1310, nel Gorz, Bezirk Lothringen, Elsaß-Lothringen, Germania, all'età di 46 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol(이)가 1264년 독일 바든 크레이스 펜버그 뒤르바치 호헨버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Heinrich III. von Baden-Hachberg(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1310년 독일 엘사ss-로스링 베지르크 로스링 고즈에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol nasceu em 1264, em Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Heinrich III. von Baden-Hachberg. Ela faleceu em 1310, em Gorz, Bezirk Lothringen, Elsaß-Lothringen, Alemanha, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol родилась в 1264 г. в местности хохенбирг, дурбач, крис оффенбург, баден, Германия, её отцу по имени Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Heinrich III. von Baden-Hachberg. Она умерла в 1310 г. в местности горз, безирк лотринген, элсаss-лотринген, Германия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes von Hohenberg Countess of Tirol nació en 1264, en Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Alemania, su papá, Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Heinrich III. von Baden-Hachberg. Murió en 1310, en Gorz, Bezirk Lothringen, Elsaß-Lothringen, Alemania, a la edad de 46 años.

th.Hohenberg, Schwarzwaldkreis, Wuerttlembe: ฮอเฮนเบรก, ดัรบาช, กไรส อเฟนบอูรก, แบเดน, ประเทศเยอรมัน

th.Kirchberg, Seitingen, Tuttlingen, Herrsc: เคิรชเบรก, สไอตอิงยวน, โอเบรามต ตอูตลิงยวน, วuร์ตเอมเบรก, ประเทศเยอรมัน
